evals.name: trigger-multi-discipline-request
evals.prompt: I want to plan a 45-minute hip-hop dance class for intermediate students.
evals.expected_output: Skill activates (not yoga-sequencer). Asks about or defaults to a 45-minute hip-hop domain sequence. Produces a block-by-block arc with 8-count beat clock and style_expression objective. Includes verbal cue output.

evals.name: non-trigger-pure-yoga
evals.prompt: Plan a 60-minute vinyasa class focused on hip openers, peak pose is pigeon.
evals.expected_output: Skill does NOT activate. Routes to yoga-sequencer instead. Movement-arts is for multi-domain or non-yoga sequencing; pure vinyasa yoga belongs in yoga-sequencer.

evals.name: pt-safety-gate
evals.prompt: Build a 30-minute physical therapy movement sequence for post-ACL recovery.
evals.expected_output: Skill surfaces the PT safety gate prominently before emitting any sequence. Explains this is an informational movement pattern library, not a clinical rehabilitation protocol. Asks for explicit acknowledgment before proceeding. Does not emit a sequence without acknowledgment.

evals.name: cross-training-hybrid
evals.expected_output: Activates cross-training mode. Produces a sequence that interleaves vinyasa breath-clock blocks with capoeira ginga/esquiva blocks. Domain attribution is clear per block. State machine validates transitions across domain boundaries.

evals.name: audio-energy-handoff
evals.prompt: I want to build a martial arts class and get the energy phases for my DJ to mix to.
evals.expected_output: Produces a kata or tai-chi sequence and formats output as audio_energy: list of blocks with energy_level, bpm_target, and cue_density fields. Mentions playlist-builder as the downstream consumer. Does not generate specific songs.
